results.overview: Eighties teenager Marty McFly is accidentally sent back in time to 1955, inadvertently disrupting his parents' first meeting and attracting his mother's romantic interest. Marty must repair the damage to history by rekindling his parents' romance and - with the help of his eccentric inventor friend Doc Brown - return to 1985.
results.title: Back to the Future

results.name: Back to the Future
results.overview:
An animated series for television based on the Back to the Future trilogy of feature films.

Based on the highly successful Back to the Future movie trilogy, this series is set, um, "after" the events of the last film, as the adventures of Marty McFly and Doc Brown in their DeLorean time machine continue. Joining the ride is Clara, (Doc's wife from Back To The Future Part III,) Jules and Verne (their sons) Einstein the dog and Jennifer (Marty's girlfriend). And apparently there's a Tannen in every time as relatives of Biff keep popping up, and creating conflict. Mary Steenburgen and Tom Wilson reprise their roles from the movies. During live portions of the show, Christopher Lloyd reprised his role as Doc Brown and was joined by Bill Nye, who conducted experiments that were used in the show.

results.name: Expedition: Back To The Future
results.overview: Josh Gates goes on the adventure of a lifetime when he and Christopher Lloyd set off to track down the most iconic movie car in Hollywood history, The DeLorean Time Machine from "Back to the Future," and deliver the vehicle to Michael J. Fox.

results.original_title: Back to the Future Part II
results.overview: Marty and Doc are at it again as the time-traveling duo head to 2015 to nip some McFly family woes in the bud. But things go awry thanks to bully Biff Tannen and a pesky sports almanac. In a last-ditch attempt to set things straight, Marty finds himself bound for 1955 and face to face with his teenage parents -- again.
results.title: Back to the Future Part II

results.original_title: Back to the Future Part III
results.overview: The final installment finds Marty digging the trusty DeLorean out of a mineshaft and looking for Doc in the Wild West of 1885. But when their time machine breaks down, the travelers are stranded in a land of spurs. More problems arise when Doc falls for pretty schoolteacher Clara Clayton, and Marty tangles with Buford Tannen.
results.title: Back to the Future Part III

results.overview: Is it good.. or bad... or both: a critical assay to fathom the momentous journey of cinema, from analogue to digital. peppered with questions & answers, sighs and pauses!
results.title: Back to the Future

results.original_title: Looking Back to the Future: Raymond Loewy, Industrial Designer
results.title: Looking Back to the Future: Raymond Loewy, Industrial Designer

results.name: Back to the Future
results.overview: In this series, we travel back in time and delve into past visions of the future. What hit the mark, and what went entirely wrong? And what do the dreams of the future reveal about the time in which they were created?
A 9-part retrospective documentary from 2009 on the trilogy’s legacy.
results.title: Looking Back to the Future

results.original_title: The Making of Back to the Future
results.overview: The Making of 'Back to the Future'
results.title: The Making of Back to the Future

results.original_title: Back to the Future: Making the Trilogy
results.overview: This is the making of the Back to the Future Trilogy by acclaimed documentary maker Laurent Bouzereau and appears on the Back to the Future DVD set.
results.title: Back to the Future: Making the Trilogy

results.original_title: Untold Stories of Back to the Future
results.overview: Bob Gale, crew members, and stuntmen share their own personal stories from the making of the original movie.
results.title: Untold Stories of Back to the Future

results.original_title: The Secrets of the 'Back to the Future' Trilogy
results.overview: The Secrets of the Back to the Future Trilogy was a program hosted by Kirk Cameron. The show answered questions that Back to the Future fans sent in by letter.  It was released onto videocassette in 1990 and as a bonus feature on the disc for Back to the Future Part III in the 2002 release of the Back to the Future trilogy. It is also available in the 2010 Blu-Ray trilogy.
results.title: The Secrets of the 'Back to the Future' Trilogy

results.original_title: Project 88: Back to the Future Too
results.overview: More than 300 fans from 9 different countries joined together to remake Back to the Future Part II during the COVID-19 quarantine. The film was split into 88 scenes with 88 teams producing their segment using available resources all while obeying local social distancing guidelines. The result is an absurdly fun, wild ride that sees everything from pro-level live action to killer animation to... bananas and potatoes used to bring Back to the Future Part II to life all over again.
results.title: Project 88: Back to the Future Too

results.original_title: Back to the Future: Dickens of a Christmas
results.overview: Trying to beat the summer heat, Dr. Brown takes all out to London on Christmas Eve 1845, where they encounter citizens who may have inspired Charles Dickens characters in A Christmas Carol, Oliver Twist, David Copperfield, and others.
results.title: Back to the Future: Dickens of a Christmas

results.name: Back to the Future: Behind Closed Doors
results.original_name: Back to the Future: Behind Closed Doors
results.overview: Back To The Future: Behind Closed Doors tells the inside story of the unlikely series of events that got the film off the ground as the crew grappled with cost overruns, an overly ambitious schedule, and unprecedented casting change that rocked the production. At the time, nobody could have predicted the impact the movie would have at the box office, and around the world for generations to come.

results.original_title: Back to the Future (Part II): Behind-the-Scenes Special Presentation
results.title: Back to the Future (Part II): Behind-the-Scenes Special Presentation

results.original_title: Romesh's Look Back to the Future
results.overview: One year ago Romesh Ranganathan and special guests Richard Osman, Katherine Ryan and Danny Dyer made some bold predictions for 2018. Now they’re getting together to see who got it bang on and whose crystal ball was on the blink.
results.title: Romesh's Look Back to the Future

results.original_title: The Making of Back to the Future II
results.overview: The making of the Back to the Future II movie
